fields.label: Domain Provider Type
fields.description: The active DNS vendor. The DNS registry maps this to the registered DnsProvider; Root Domain denormalizes it at insert. Only Route53 is implemented.

fields.label: Access Key ID
fields.description: AWS IAM access key id with route53:* on the hosted zone.

fields.label: Secret Access Key
fields.description: AWS IAM secret. Rotate by clearing via db.set_value, then re-saving.

fields.label: Region
fields.description: AWS API region for signing. Route 53 is global; us-east-1 is a safe default.
